## Metadata checklist

- [ ] Focused platform list
- [ ] Stable AWI rule IDs
- [ ] SemVer compatibility range
- [ ] Provenance metadata
- [ ] Safe/vulnerable fixture coverage if platform coverage changes
- [ ] `rules verify` should pass
